locator.quote: The genetic algorithm can happily mutate values

text: Sampled ≠ used: the GA can happily mutate values that no downstream code ever reads (reward_precision_bonus sat in the schema for weeks, mutated every gen, never changed any reward).

locator.quote: asserts the env (or trainer) actually uses the sampled value

text: Rule: every gene must have a test that asserts the env (or trainer) actually uses the sampled value, not just that it was sampled.

locator.quote: coefficient is a *sensitivity* metric, not a *significance*

text: The gene↔outcome correlation coefficient is a sensitivity metric, not a significance metric: it scaled −0.038→−0.255 from 2 to 4 train days; don't threshold a dead-gene check past single-gen power.
